sizing_rule.note: Ralph Vince optimal f method: test f values 0–1 across historical trades, select f that maximizes geometric mean of HPRs (TWR), then apply: position_size_multiplier = f / worst_case_loss. Requires complete historical trade dataset for optimization.

source_rule_text: Position size is determined by finding the optimal f value that maximizes the geometric mean of HPRs across historical trades, calculated by testing f values from 0 to 1 and selecting the f that produces the highest TWR geometric mean.
